mapper.update:
update server_resource_alarm set alarm_status = #{alarmStatus},end_time = now(),update_time = now() where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select id, resource_id, alarm_type, alarm_status, is_deleted, begin_time, end_time, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status from server_resource_alarm where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select id, resource_id, alarm_type, alarm_status, begin_time, end_time from server_resource_alarm where is_deleted = 0 and end_time is null

select id, resource_id, alarm_type, alarm_status, is_deleted, begin_time, end_time, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status from server_resource_alarm where is_deleted = 0 and end_time is null
and resource_id = #{resourcesId}
mapper.insert: insert into server_resource_alarm(id, resource_id, alarm_type, alarm_status, is_deleted, begin_time, end_time, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values (#{id}, #{resourceId}, #{alarmType}, #{alarmStatus}, #{isDeleted}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status})

insert into server_resource_alarm(id,resource_id, alarm_type, alarm_status, is_deleted, begin_time, end_time, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.resourceId}, #{entity.alarmType}, #{entity.alarmStatus}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.beginTime}, #{entity.endTime}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})

insert into server_resource_alarm(id,resource_id, alarm_type, alarm_status, is_deleted, begin_time, end_time, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.resourceId}, #{entity.alarmType}, #{entity.alarmStatus}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.beginTime}, #{entity.endTime}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})
on duplicate key update resource_id = values(resource_id), alarm_type = values(alarm_type), alarm_status = values(alarm_status), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), begin_time = values(begin_time), end_time = values(end_time), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time), status = values(status)
